text: Jarvis, quick check-in. What's on the calendar today?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, January 11. No work meetings today. You have Ethan's soccer practice scheduled and a quiet dinner with the family.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick log: Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Ethan's team played a match and won 4-3! Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! Sounds exciting! What a great win for Frisco FC! He's showing real growth on defense. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Planning our weekly meals today. We want to try a home-cooked chicken parmesan on Thursday. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. I've got the grocery list ready. Recipe saved. I've added marinara and mozzarella to the grocery list. I've updated the shared shopping list.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Having dinner with our friends tonight. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! I've noted the plans. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. Trying to unwind after a stressful day. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Sure thing! Relaxation mode active. Reading is a great way to disconnect. I've set a quiet sleep timer. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: The kitchen sink area has a problem. The living room lights aren't responding to commands. Will work on this over the weekend.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! I can help troubleshoot that. The smart-home bridge needs a manual power cycle. Unplug it for 10 seconds. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Screen time is always a negotiation. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Lily blew bubbles without crying during her swim lessons. It's great to see them having fun.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. I've got the schedule covered. That's a major swim milestone! Her confidence is really building. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick log: Sarah found a new recipe to try. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: I've got the grocery list ready. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We got invited to a neighbor's house. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Got it, Mike. Social breaks are great. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Listening to a podcast in the garage. It was a really interesting history episode. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: Personal time is valuable. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: The smart-home hub is acting up today. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. Automations are great when they work. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. That sounds like a sweet moment. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, logging today's journal. Productive Saturday fixing things around the house. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Had a great catch-up with the neighbors. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
